name: Rayong city core
notes: Provincial capital and strongest civic-retail node in Rayong.

name: Ban Chang and U-Tapao side service node
notes: Western Rayong transport and service node linked to airport and industry.

name: Klaeng district center
notes: Eastern service town and Route 3 corridor node.

name: Wang Chan district center
notes: Interior district service node for community coverage.

name: Ban Khai district center
notes: Community and industrial spillover node west of central Rayong.

name: Pluak Daeng industrial town core
notes: Primary industrial and worker-service node for north-west Rayong.

name: Khao Chamao district center
notes: Smaller inland service node with lower year-round demand intensity.

name: Nikhom Phatthana industrial service node
notes: Industrial-service district linking Rayong city side with the Pluak Daeng estate corridor.
